title: PCIe D2H Copy and Same-Region Kernel Timing

question.ja: D2H copy と kernel write が同じ device アドレス範囲そのものを別 stream で同時に触っても、wall time は x+y に近いか、それとも max(x, y) に近いか。
question.en: When a D2H copy and a kernel write touch the exact same device address range on separate streams, does wall time behave more like x+y or more like max(x, y)?

focus: Overlap wall time vs x+y and vs max(x, y)

comparisons.ja: 同時実行 wall time と solo copy + solo kernel の和
comparisons.en: Simultaneous wall time vs solo copy plus solo kernel

comparisons.ja: 同時実行 wall time と max(solo copy, solo kernel)
comparisons.en: Simultaneous wall time vs max(solo copy, solo kernel)

considerations.ja: この bench は correctness を捨てた timing bench であり、copy 先の host データの壊れは見ません。validation は CUDA の launch・copy・synchronize が正常終了したかだけを見ます。
considerations.en: This benchmark intentionally drops correctness and looks only at timing. It does not inspect the copied host data, and validation checks only whether CUDA launch, copy, and synchronization complete successfully.

considerations.ja: D2H copy は device buffer を読み、kernel はその全く同じ device 領域へ書きます。したがってこれは正しさの benchmark ではなく、race 条件でも時間的 overlap が成立するかを見る benchmark です。
considerations.en: The D2H copy reads from a device buffer while the kernel writes to that exact same device region. This is therefore not a correctness benchmark but a timing benchmark for whether overlap still happens under a race condition.

considerations.ja: 主判定は wall time のみです。timing backend は wall_clock 固定で、x+y に近いか max(x, y) に近いかで読みます。
considerations.en: The main judgment uses wall time only. The timing backend is fixed to wall_clock, and the result is interpreted by whether the overlap wall time is closer to x+y or to max(x, y).

summary.ja: same-region race 条件でも wall time は x+y ではなくほぼ max(x, y) に寄りました。時間だけを見ると、separate-memory の copy+kernel overlap bench と同様に強く重なっています。
summary.en: Even under a same-region race condition, wall time stayed close to max(x, y) rather than x+y. From a timing-only perspective, the copy and kernel still overlap strongly, similar to the separate-memory copy+kernel overlap benchmark.

highlights.ja: 128 MB: solo copy 2.394 ms, solo kernel 2.714 ms, overlap 2.794 ms, ratio_to_sum 0.547, ratio_to_max 1.029
highlights.en: 128 MB: solo copy 2.394 ms, solo kernel 2.714 ms, overlap 2.794 ms, ratio_to_sum 0.547, ratio_to_max 1.029

highlights.ja: 512 MB: solo copy 9.760 ms, solo kernel 11.235 ms, overlap 11.363 ms, ratio_to_sum 0.541, ratio_to_max 1.011
highlights.en: 512 MB: solo copy 9.760 ms, solo kernel 11.235 ms, overlap 11.363 ms, ratio_to_sum 0.541, ratio_to_max 1.011

highlights.ja: 1024 MB: solo copy 19.078 ms, solo kernel 19.245 ms, overlap 19.407 ms, ratio_to_sum 0.506, ratio_to_max 1.008
highlights.en: 1024 MB: solo copy 19.078 ms, solo kernel 19.245 ms, overlap 19.407 ms, ratio_to_sum 0.506, ratio_to_max 1.008

highlights.ja: 最小 wall_vs_solo_sum_ratio は 0.506、最小 wall_vs_solo_max_ratio は 1.008 で、同時実行時間はほぼ max(x, y) でした。
highlights.en: The minimum wall_vs_solo_sum_ratio was 0.506 and the minimum wall_vs_solo_max_ratio was 1.008, so overlap wall time was effectively at max(x, y).
